lane.title: 02 Google Ads
lane.last_task: Verify Google Ads live account and delivery state
lane.last_summary: Read lane memory/control graph and live HE Google Ads APIs. Verified account customer 368-171-0084 via hamzaexpress.in API; active Search campaigns are Late Night 23854158442 ₹300/day, Dinner 23855561197 ₹150/day, Brand 23845870050 ₹50/day, all ENABLED/SERVING; PMax 23834053403 remains PAUSED at ₹300/day. 7d cockpit shows ₹2301.14 spend and 70 clicks, almost entirely Late Night; Dinner/Brand enabled but not materially delivering. Campaign criteria show HE pin proximity only: Late Night 7km, Dinner 3km, Brand 5km, PMax 2km; no city LOCATION criteria. Directions proof endpoint live with today's page_view/maps_auto_open events, currently from Meta UTMs rather than Google gclid. No ad mutation performed.
lane.next_action: Before any mutation, verify the specific target campaign/ad group/keyword IDs and decide whether to tune Late Night negatives/bids, fix Dinner/Brand delivery, or resume PMax; preserve rollback plan and current budgets.
lane.mutation_status: blocked until explicit live mutation approval; read-only verification only
